title: google-vertex: Missing gemini-3.1-flash-lite in provider catalog causes silent failure instead of error

per_label_rationale.label: model_serving
per_label_rationale.rationale: The core failure is a hosted Google Vertex provider catalog/model selection mismatch causing model_not_found.

per_label_rationale.label: model_releases
per_label_rationale.rationale: The issue is specifically about adding/supporting the versioned gemini-3.1-flash-lite model.

per_label_rationale.label: agent_runtime
per_label_rationale.rationale: The silent drop occurs in embedded-agent-runner and runWithModelFallback during agent execution.

per_label_rationale.label: reliability
per_label_rationale.rationale: The agent silently produces no reply instead of surfacing an error or fallback when the model is missing.

excluded_label_rationale.label: config
excluded_label_rationale.rationale: Although a static provider catalog file is mentioned, the central concern is model availability/selection and fallback behavior, not user configuration schema or defaults.

excluded_label_rationale.label: chat_integrations
excluded_label_rationale.rationale: Discord is only the observed channel; the root cause is not Discord-specific delivery behavior.

ambiguity.why_not_hard: The issue explicitly names a missing provider model entry plus fallback/runtime silent failure; only the provider-catalog-versus-config boundary is notable.

per_label_rationale.label: model_serving
per_label_rationale.rationale: The issue centers on a provider catalog/model selection failure for Google Vertex that raises model_not_found for a selectable model.

per_label_rationale.label: config
per_label_rationale.rationale: The requested fix includes updating the static Google Vertex provider catalog/default model definitions.

per_label_rationale.label: reliability
per_label_rationale.rationale: The fallback path swallows a known FailoverError and leaves the agent silent with no fallback or user-facing error.

per_label_rationale.label: agent_runtime
per_label_rationale.rationale: The failure occurs in the embedded agent runner/model-fallback execution path before the agent can produce a reply.

per_label_rationale.label: model_releases
per_label_rationale.rationale: A specific newly available Gemini model version, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, is missing from OpenClaw's catalog.

excluded_label_rationale.label: chat_integrations
excluded_label_rationale.rationale: Discord is only the reported channel/environment; the defect is not in Discord integration behavior.

ambiguity.why_not_hard: The title and root-cause analysis explicitly identify the missing model catalog entry and the fallback/runtime silent-failure behavior.
